title: xAI Opens Grok Build 0.1 to Developers via API
summary: xAI Opens Grok Build 0.1 to Developers via API - DevOps.com The agentic coding space is getting more crowded. xAI has made Grok Build 0.1, its fastest coding model, available via the xAI API in public beta.
content: xAI Opens Grok Build 0.1 to Developers via API - DevOps.com The agentic coding space is getting more crowded. xAI has made Grok Build 0.1, its fastest coding model, available via the xAI API in public beta. That means developers can now build directly on top of the same model that powers xAI’s Grok
